scope_goal: Harden context basket and vault persistence recovery so valid local state is salvaged and rewritten safely, then emit a review packet for the actual branch head with accurate ownership and budget accounting.
tasks_completed: Hardened context basket persistence to quarantine unreadable files, salvage valid item IDs, and rewrite normalized state after recovery.
Hardened vault state persistence to recover from corrupt primary/tmp/backup files while preserving safe lock behavior.
Accepted metadata-only corruption in persisted basket and vault payloads so valid core state is salvaged and rewritten instead of discarded.
Added focused recovery tests for mixed invalid basket entries, legacy basket payloads, and metadata-only corruption in basket and vault state.
Regenerated the handoff packet metadata for the actual branch head with explicit AGENTS budget reporting and a precise ownership exception note.
roadmap_items: Milestone 1 - Bootstrap Flow Stabilization: context basket and vault persistence hardening.
kickoff_budget_note: Thread Kickoff Template budget applied: task budget `8`, time budget `45m`, size limits `<=12 files` and `<=500 net LOC`, max fix attempts per failing gate `2`. Tasks completed: `5 of 8`. Budget status: within limits at `5` files changed and `126` net LOC versus `codex/integrator`, with no time-budget overrun recorded for this handoff.
approved_exception_note: Ownership note: lane-owned edits stay within `src/qual/context/**` and `src/qual/storage/**`; the only approved non-owned change is `tests/unit/test_context_storage_recovery.py` for focused recovery coverage. No shared-by-approval source files or integrator-locked files were edited.
